applicable_answered.question_text: Does the paper show code of the feature it is proposing?

references.quote: [[gnu::always_inline]] constexpr void constant_assert(bool cond) { if (not __builtin_constant_p(cond)) [] [[gnu::error("constant assert - not constant")]] () { }(); if (not cond) [] [[gnu::noinline, gnu::error("constant assert - false")]] () { }(); }
